methylTracer 0.99.8
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Reference

Data Input / Output

build_count_matrix()

Build methylation and coverage matrices

build_h5()

Create HDF5 file for methylTracer input

build_met_obj()

Create a methylTracer object from an HDF5 file

h5_dataset_exists()

Check if HDF5 dataset exists safely

h5_read_safe()

Safe HDF5 read operation

h5_write_safe()

Safe HDF5 write operation

with_h5file_safe()

Execute code with HDF5 file safely opened

write_cell_file()

Write Cell Data to File

DMR Detection

calldmrs_turbo()

Call differentially methylated regions (DMRs) using the turbo algorithm

pre_calldmrs()

Prepare differential methylation analysis (DMR pre-computation)

implant_dmrs()

Implant DMRs (Differentially Methylated Regions)

dmrs_to_sce_memory()

Aggregate DMR-level methylation per cell (in-memory) and build SingleCellExperiment

Single-Cell Conversion

met_to_sce()

Convert a methylTracer object to SingleCellExperiment

sce_to_met()

Convert a SingleCellExperiment back to a methylTracer object

create_cpg_universe()

Create CpG Universe (Genomic Coordinates)

Quality Control

compute_qc_value()

Compute QC metrics for a methylTracer object

filter_obs_var()

Filter cells and features in a methylTracer object

impute_met_obj()

Impute missing values in a methylTracer object

Clustering

cluster_met_cells()

Cluster cells in a methylTracer object

Accessors

metObs()

Retrieve observations from a methylTracer object

metVar()

Retrieve variable-level metadata from a methylTracer object

metX()

Retrieve methylation matrix from a methylTracer object

computeObs()

Compute Column Means for Observation Groups

computeVar()

Compute Column Means for Variable Groups

Visualization

plot_dens()

Plot density of a QC or methylation vector

plot_dmrs()

Plot Differentially Methylated Regions (DMRs)

plot_hist()

Plot histogram of a QC vector from a methylTracer object

plot_scatter()

Scatter plot of QC metrics with grouping

Simulation

simulate_scBS_data()

Simulate Single-Cell Bisulfite Sequencing (scBS) Data

simulate_single_cell()

Simulate a Single Cell's Data

print(<scBS_simulation>)

Print method for scBS_simulation objects

summary(<scBS_simulation>)

Summary method for scBS_simulation objects

Utilities

safe_system2()

Safe wrapper for system2 calls

validate_inputs()

Validate all user inputs for security

validate_path_safety()

Check for dangerous shell metacharacters in paths

validate_sample_names()

Validate sample names for safety

Contents

Developed by Zetian Jia, Xiang Li.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
